title: Physiological Adaptation: Hematology & GI
description: Anemia, Clotting Disorders, Blood Transfusions, GI Pathologies
content: Hematology: Anemia, Sickle Cell, Hemophilia, DIC, HIT\nBlood Transfusions & Reactions\nGI System: IBD (Chrons vs UC), Liver Failure (Cirrhosis), Biliary Atresia

title: Physiological Adaptation: Renal & Musculoskeletal
description: AKI/CKD, Dialysis, Fractures, Trauma (Compartment Syndrome), Catheter Care
content:
Renal System: Pyelonephritis, AKI vs CKD, Dialysis (Hemo vs Peritoneal)
Urinary: Catheter Care & Infections
Musculoskeletal: Fractures, Compartment Syndrome, Fat Embolism, Rhabdomyolysis
Trauma: Amputation Care, Tourniquets

title: Physiological Adaptation: Metabolic & Integumentary
content:
Fluid & Electrolytes: ABGs, Sodium/Potassium Imbalances
Integumentary: Burns, Necrotizing Fasciitis, Wound Care (Wound Vac)
Sensory: Eye/Ear Disorders (Meniere's, Glaucoma)
Neurological: Bell's Palsy, Temporal Arteritis

title: Complex Care & Emergencies
content: Sepsis Spectrum: SIRS, Septic Shock, MODS, DIC\nOB Emergencies: Abruptio Placentae, Placenta Previa, Preeclampsia/Eclampsia/HELLP\nGeriatrics: Delirium vs Dementia, Atypical Presentation (Sepsis w/o fever)

title: Practice Test Strategy
description: Deep Dive into Practice Test 1: Case Studies, Prioritization, Procedures, Math
content:
Case Study 1: Small Bowel Obstruction (Clustering Technique)
Case Study 2: Preeclampsia/Mag Toxicity
Case Study 3: Acute Delirium & Safety
Procedures: NG Tube, Prosthetic Eye
Math: Dosage Calc & Conversions

title: Final Readiness & Mental Strategy
description: Managing Test Anxiety, Peak Performance, High-Yield Fact Review
content: Test Anxiety: Causes & Management (Sleep, Nutrition, Mindset)\nStudy Strategy: Pacing, Analyzing Errors (Knowledge vs Application)\nHigh Yield Review: Delirium Safety, Infection Control (Rubella/Droplet), Chest Tubes, Diet Math
